name: harthome
description: HartHome — the command center for your home. Chores, calendar, goals, rewards, grocery, bills, budget, utilities, and asset maintenance on any screen.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=frontend
